response.justification: The candidate has strong general software engineering credentials with 20 years of diverse experience and meets the minimum 15-year requirement, but lacks the demonstrated AI/ML expertise and strategic platform-building experience critical for this Director-level AI Strategy position. While recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agents) at re:cinq is promising, there is no portfolio of AI products, no deep machine learning knowledge, and no evidence of advising on AI strategy—all essential for this role focused on identifying AI differentiation opportunities and guiding customers on cutting-edge technologies.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience spanning 20 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains with strong polyglot technical depth
Demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership through founding and maintaining GISCollective as an open-source platform, showing initiative beyond employment
Track record of technical mentorship and knowledge sharing through workshops, courses, and teaching roles at multiple organizations
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or portfolio of AI-powered products built—only 1 month of exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP/agents) is insufficient for a Principal AI Strategy role
Lacks Master's or PhD in AI-related field, limiting credibility when advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI technologies and research
Limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership or organizational influence shaping innovation initiatives across multiple teams and product lines

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and seniority level
